{ "name": "is-fullwidth-code-point", "version": "3.0.0", "description": "Check if the character represented by a given Unicode code point is fullwidth", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/is-fullwidth-code-point", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "sindresorhus.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=8" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd-check" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "fullwidth", "full-width", "full", "width", "unicode", "character", "string", "codepoint", "code", "point", "is", "detect", "check" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^1.3.1", "tsd-check": "^0.5.0", "xo": "^0.24.0" } }
